sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'Uh,' is a filler word and does not affect the meaning of the sentence.

The actual transcription uses the symbol '@' and the format 'email.com' instead of the spoken 'at email dot com'. This is a minor error as the meaning (an email address) is preserved, just written in a different format.
